_instructions: Copy this file to examples/<resource-key>/review-packet.json. One packet per signal candidate. Generated by dry-run evaluator; do not hand-edit downstream.

llmExplanation._note: Optional. LLM may write a human-readable explanation but MUST NOT alter ruleResult or confidence.

_allowedActionsNote: Each entry: {action, surface, capabilityRequired}. Default review-first; no auto-send / auto-approval / auto-execution.
_forbiddenActionsNote: Explicit list of actions that must NOT be taken from this packet (e.g. official write to external system, cross-workspace aggregation).
_rollbackPathNote: How to undo or compensate if the recommended action turns out to be wrong; required even when no action is taken yet.

mustPushEligibility._eligibleNote: Only TPQR-001 / TPQR-003 / TPQR-004 signals can be eligible during May Phase 3 window.
